title: Project Context
subtitle: Markdown files discovered in your repo's specs, docs, and insights folders.

emptyState.title: No documents found
emptyState.body: No markdown files were discovered under specs/, docs/, or insights/ in the repo. Make sure the repo is synced.

preview.title: Preview
preview.noSelection: Select a document from the list to preview it.

edit.warning: Edits are local to the review clone and may be overwritten on the next sync.
